title: ResearchLog
description: Per-run audit trail written by the Research Orchestrator. Documents every search query and every Playwright fetch performed during the run, providing evidence that can be inspected after the fact to verify what the agent actually did.

searches.description: All web searches performed during Candidate Discovery and Price Research, in order.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the search was performed, e.g. '2026-03-18T17:32:58Z'. Used to verify parallel execution across phases.

result_summary.description: Brief description of what was found

playwright_fetches.description: All pages loaded via Playwright during Price Research and Final Verification, in order. Each entry is evidence that a specific page was loaded and what was read from it.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the page was loaded, e.g. '2026-03-18T17:35:12Z'. Used to verify parallel execution across phases.

page_title.description: Browser tab title — proves which page was loaded

price_found.description: Price read directly from the live page. Null if page failed to load or showed no price.

in_stock_found.description: Stock status read from the live page.

store_location_verified.description: For in-store retailers: the store name and city confirmed via store locator before checking availability.

screenshot.description: Relative path to screenshot saved in runs/[timestamp]/screenshots/

errors.description: Any fetch errors or unexpected page states encountered.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the error occurred.

token_usage.description: Token counts for this run, recorded by the Research Orchestrator from subagent responses.

sources.description: All sources consulted during the run, classified by type. Populated from community_research.sources, spec_verification.sources_checked, and official_product_url per candidate.

candidate.description: Product name this source was used for

label.description: Human-readable name for the source (e.g. site name or article title)
